heading: Disclosure requirement for official business conducted using non-official electronic messaging accounts
label: 2911 Disclosure requirement for official business conducted using non-official electronic messaging accounts

children.text: copies an official electronic messaging account of the officer or employee in the original creation or transmission of the record; or
forwards a complete copy of the record to an official electronic messaging account of the officer or employee not later than 20 days after the original creation or transmission of the record.

children.heading: .—Adverse Actions
children.label: b .—Adverse Actions
children.text: The intentional violation of subsection (a) (including any rules, regulations, or other implementing guidelines), as determined by the appropriate supervisor, shall be a basis for disciplinary action in accordance with subchapter I, II, or V of chapter 75 of title 5, as the case may be.

children.heading: .—Electronic messages
children.label: 1 .—Electronic messages
children.text: The term “electronic messages” means electronic mail and other electronic messaging systems that are used for purposes of communicating between individuals.

children.heading: .—Electronic messaging account
children.label: 2 .—Electronic messaging account
children.text: The term “electronic messaging account” means any account that sends electronic messages.

children.heading: .—Executive agency
children.label: 3 .—Executive agency
children.text: The term “executive agency” has the meaning given that term in .section 105 of title 5
